nodes.name: test_symbol_target_lists_reachable_files
nodes.description: Verifies that blast radius output includes the target file and all reachable dependency files.

nodes.name: test_symbol_target_summary_line
nodes.description: Verifies that the blast radius summary correctly reports the total number of affected files and maximum hop distance.

nodes.name: test_output_is_one_file_per_line
nodes.description: Ensures blast radius output displays each affected file on a separate line without extra whitespace.

nodes.name: test_duplicate_rows_deduped_to_minimum_hop
nodes.description: Verifies that duplicate files in results are deduplicated, keeping only the entry with the minimum hop distance.

nodes.name: test_target_file_included_exactly_once_even_if_in_rows
nodes.description: Ensures the target file appears exactly once in output even if it appears in the dependency rows.

nodes.name: test_hop_limit_respected
nodes.description: Verifies that the maximum hop limit is correctly passed to the client when querying blast radius.

nodes.name: assert_called_once_with
nodes.description: python function

nodes.name: test_not_found_exits_nonzero
nodes.description: Verifies that querying a nonexistent symbol exits with a non-zero status code.

nodes.name: raises
nodes.description: python function

nodes.name: test_not_found_prints_error
nodes.description: Verifies that querying a nonexistent symbol prints an error message containing the symbol name.

nodes.name: test_empty_graph_no_traceback
nodes.description: Verifies that a symbol with no dependencies displays cleanly without errors or tracebacks.

nodes.name: test_rich_output_contains_headers
nodes.description: Verifies that rich-formatted output includes column headers for File, Relationship, and Hops.

nodes.name: test_idempotency
nodes.description: Verifies that running blast radius analysis multiple times with the same inputs produces identical output.

nodes.name: test_staleness_stamp_included
nodes.description: Verifies that the index update timestamp is included in the output when provided.

nodes.name: tests.test_batch_impact
nodes.description: Test module for batch impact analysis functionality.

nodes.name: test_single_target_matches_blast_radius
nodes.description: Verifies that a single target file and its direct dependency are both included in the output.

nodes.name: test_single_target_via_annotation
nodes.description: Confirms that the via annotation shows the source file for a dependency impact.

nodes.name: test_overlapping_dependents_deduplicated
nodes.description: Ensures that when multiple targets depend on the same file, it appears only once in the output.

nodes.name: test_overlapping_dependents_via_lists_both_targets
nodes.description: Validates that shared dependencies list all source targets in the via annotation.

nodes.name: test_no_overlap_union_is_additive
nodes.description: Verifies that dependencies from multiple non-overlapping targets are all included in the output.

nodes.name: test_mixed_valid_invalid_warns_and_continues
nodes.description: Tests that invalid targets trigger a warning while valid targets' results are still displayed.

nodes.name: test_mixed_valid_invalid_exits_zero
nodes.description: Confirms the batch impact command exits successfully when at least one valid target is provided.

nodes.name: test_all_invalid_exits_nonzero
nodes.description: Verifies the command exits with an error code when all targets are invalid.

nodes.name: test_all_invalid_prints_warning_per_target
nodes.description: Ensures warnings are printed for each invalid target when all targets are invalid.

nodes.name: test_also_in_input_flag
nodes.description: Tests that a target appearing as both input and dependency is marked with [also in input] flag.

nodes.name: test_no_also_in_input_for_unrelated_deps
nodes.description: Confirms that dependencies not in the input targets do not show the [also in input] flag.

nodes.name: test_hops_forwarded_to_get_blast_radius
nodes.description: Validates that the max_hops parameter is correctly passed to the client's get_blast_radius method.

nodes.name: test_summary_line_format
nodes.description: Verifies the batch impact summary displays correct counts of files, targets, and maximum hops.

nodes.name: test_rich_output_has_table_columns
nodes.description: Confirms that rich table output includes File, Via, and Hops columns.

nodes.name: test_css_variable_declaration_indexed
nodes.description: Verifies that CSS custom variable declarations are indexed with DEFINED_IN relation triples.

nodes.description: Verifies that CSS custom variable usage via var() is indexed with USES_VAR relation triples.

nodes.description: Verifies that duplicate USES_VAR triples for the same variable are deduplicated per file.

nodes.name: test_scss_nested_variable_usage
nodes.description: Verifies that nested CSS variable usage in SCSS is correctly indexed with USES_VAR relations.

nodes.name: test_scss_import_indexed
nodes.description: Verifies that SCSS @import statements are indexed with IMPORTS relation triples.

nodes.name: test_scss_use_indexed
nodes.description: Verifies that SCSS @use statements are indexed with IMPORTS relation triples.

nodes.name: test_html_custom_element_tag_indexed
nodes.description: Verifies that HTML custom element tags (containing hyphens) are indexed with REFERENCES relation triples.

nodes.name: test_html_custom_element_dedup
nodes.description: Verifies that duplicate REFERENCES triples for the same custom element tag are deduplicated per file.

nodes.name: test_html_plain_tags_not_indexed_as_references
nodes.description: Verifies that standard HTML tags without hyphens do not produce REFERENCES relation triples.

nodes.name: test_existing_js_behaviour_unchanged
nodes.description: Verifies that JavaScript parsing continues to produce IMPORTS and CALLS relation triples as before.

nodes.name: test_css_does_not_emit_js_relations
nodes.description: Verifies that CSS files do not emit JavaScript-specific relation types like CALLS or INHERITS.

nodes.description: Tests that chunk_text correctly splits long text into multiple chunks when tokens exceed the per-chunk limit, with token overlap.

nodes.name: test_chunk_text_short_input
nodes.description: Tests that chunk_text returns input text as a single chunk when it is shorter than the token limit.

nodes.name: test_deduplication
nodes.description: Tests that write_triples deduplicates identical triples and only writes each unique triple once to the client.

nodes.name: test_distinct_triples_all_written
nodes.description: Tests that write_triples writes all distinct triples without deduplication when they differ.

nodes.name: test_extract_triples_valid_response
nodes.description: Tests that _extract_triples_sync correctly parses valid JSON responses from Claude containing entities and relations.

nodes.name: test_extract_triples_bad_json
nodes.description: Tests that _extract_triples_sync handles malformed JSON gracefully by returning an empty list.

nodes.name: test_extract_triples_missing_entity_skipped
nodes.description: Tests that _extract_triples_sync skips relations referencing entities that are not defined in the response.

nodes.name: test_php_file_parses_without_error
nodes.description: Tests that PHP parser produces triples from valid PHP code without raising errors.

nodes.name: test_top_level_function_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that top-level function definitions are correctly indexed as DEFINED_IN triples.

nodes.name: test_class_extends_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that class inheritance relationships are correctly indexed as INHERITS triples.

nodes.name: test_class_implements_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that interface implementations are correctly indexed as INHERITS triples for each implemented interface.

nodes.name: test_class_method_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that class methods are correctly indexed as DEFINED_IN triples.

nodes.name: test_property_declaration_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that protected static properties with type hints in classes are correctly indexed with a DEFINED_IN relationship.

nodes.name: test_constructor_promoted_property_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that constructor-promoted properties are correctly indexed as being defined within their containing class.

nodes.name: test_class_constant_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that class constants are correctly indexed with a DEFINED_IN relationship to their containing class.

nodes.name: test_top_level_constant_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that top-level constants are correctly indexed as being defined within the module.

nodes.name: test_interface_declaration_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that interface declarations are correctly indexed with a DEFINED_IN relationship.

nodes.name: test_interface_extends_multiple_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that interfaces extending multiple parent interfaces are correctly indexed with INHERITS relationships to each parent.

nodes.name: test_trait_declaration_and_use_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that trait declarations and their usage in classes are correctly indexed with DEFINED_IN and INHERITS relationships.

nodes.name: test_enum_and_case_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that enum declarations and their cases are correctly indexed with DEFINED_IN relationships.

nodes.name: test_namespace_use_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that namespace use statements are correctly indexed with IMPORTS relationships.

nodes.name: test_namespace_use_group_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that grouped namespace use statements are correctly indexed with IMPORTS relationships for each imported entity.

nodes.name: test_require_once_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that require_once statements are correctly indexed with INCLUDES relationships.

nodes.name: test_plain_function_call_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that function calls between functions are correctly indexed with CALLS relationships.

nodes.name: test_method_call_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that method calls on objects are correctly indexed with CALLS relationships to both the method and the class.

nodes.name: test_static_call_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that static method calls are correctly indexed with CALLS relationships.

nodes.name: test_self_new_not_recorded_as_class_entity
nodes.description: Tests that instantiations using self, static, or parent keywords are not recorded as CALLS relationships to those pseudo-keywords.

nodes.name: test_closure_assigned_to_variable_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that closures assigned to variables are indexed with the variable name in PHP code.

nodes.name: test_arrow_function_assigned_to_variable_indexed
nodes.description: Tests that arrow functions assigned to variables are indexed with the variable name in PHP code.

nodes.name: test_php_does_not_emit_html_relations
nodes.description: Tests that the PHP parser does not emit HTML-specific relation types like HAS_CLASS or STYLES.
